Package gov.nasa.pds.registry.common.dd.parser

Class ClassAttrAssociationParser

java.lang.Object
gov.nasa.pds.registry.common.dd.parser.BaseLddParser
gov.nasa.pds.registry.common.dd.parser.ClassAttrAssociationParser
public class ClassAttrAssociationParser extends BaseLddParser
PDS LDD JSON file parser. Parses "dataDictionary" -> "classDictionary" subtree and extracts attribute associations ("class" -> "association" -> "isAttribute" == true). For each "attributeId" a callback method is called.
Author:
karpenko
